---
title: "Ruairí Cullen"
image: images/ruairi_profile.JPG
about:
    template: trestles
    links: 
        - icon: linkedin
          text: Linkedin
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruairi-c-02b268130/
          target: _blank
        - icon: github
          text: GitHub 
          href: https://github.com/RuairiCullen
          target: _blank
        - icon: envelope
          text: Email
          href: mailto:ruairi.c12@gmail.com
---

## Hi, Welcome to Ruairí's E-Home!

I am a part-qualified accountant with the Mercantile Group and a Business Analytics student 
at DCU. I have a passion for understanding numbers and real-world data in order to power  
evidence-based decisions.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
💼 **In Work:** Currently working as the management accountant for Beatty Solid Fuels. In addition, the AR & AP specialist for Stafford Fuels Ltd and Shamrock Products Ltd. Learning to balance time and prioritisation!
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
🎓 **In College:** Currently working with Agvance Ltd & Animal Farmacy on a live ML inventory dashboard as part of my Applied Consultancy Project at DCU.
:::

[View my projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} 
[About me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
